description_long: This house features a rectangular, elongated structure with a flat roof and a mix of vertical and horizontal siding. The front facade includes a single wooden door with a small window above it, and a pair of windows to the left. The rear of the house has a visible brick chimney, a fenced area, and a back door with a window. One side of the house displays a combination of white siding and a section of wooden paneling, as well as a sloped roof over a side extension. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements. The house appears to be a single-story urban dwelling, likely constructed from wood, brick, and other common residential materials.
description: A single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white siding, wooden accents, and a brick chimney. The entryway features a wooden door and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two windows, and the white vertical siding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden paneling, sloped roof extension, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a brick chimney, fenced area, back door, and a window; roof and siding details are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing mostly plain siding, the brick chimney, and the sloped roof extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with a small window above, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
